Senior Backend Engineer — Data Platform
TechCorp | San Francisco, CA (Hybrid)

About TechCorp
TechCorp builds real-time analytics infrastructure for enterprise customers. We process over 10 billion events per day across our distributed platform.

Role Overview
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Data Platform team. You will design and build the systems that ingest, process, and serve large-scale streaming data to our analytics products.

Required Qualifications
• 4+ years of professional software engineering experience
• Strong proficiency in Python or Go
• Experience building and operating distributed systems at scale
• Hands-on experience with stream processing systems (Kafka, Kinesis, or similar)
• Proficiency with PostgreSQL or other relational databases
• Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
• Track record of building reliable, production-grade services

Preferred Qualifications
• Experience with AWS or GCP cloud infrastructure
• Familiarity with data pipeline frameworks (Airflow, Spark)
• Prior experience in a fast-paced startup environment

Responsibilities
• Design and implement data ingestion pipelines capable of handling millions of events per second
• Own the reliability and performance of core platform services
• Collaborate with data science and product teams to ship new analytics features
• Drive technical architecture decisions and mentor junior engineers
• Participate in on-call rotation

What We Offer
• Competitive salary ($180K-$220K)
• Remote-friendly with SF hub
• Equity package
• Collaborative, low-ego culture
